title: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: April 20, 2023
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Fentanyl is one of the most dangerous and deadly drugs circulating on the illegal drug market.
Just 2 milligrams of fentanyl is enough to kill.
Statewide fentanyl deaths in California increased from 239 deaths in 2016 to 3,946 in 2020.
In California, 71% of all opioid-related deaths in 2020 were a result of fentanyl poisoning.
AB 1027 aims to prevent fentanyl poisoning by enacting more stringent data collection and storage requirements for social media companies.
AB 955 would increase penalties for those convicted of fentanyl sales by imprisonment for 3, 6, or 9 years.
Fentanyl is responsible for one in five deaths of young people in California.
Senator Dave Cortese's SB 10 would create opioid prevention and education programs in schools.
